overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit futuristic city street at dusk. The player character walks along sidewalks past holographic advertisements, observes towering skyscrapers, and crosses into the street while navigating through pedestrian crowds and light vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with holographic storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting at outdoor dining table on the right side

entered.detail: tall glass skyscraper with vertical green and yellow neon lighting strips
large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements on the building facade
overhead highway or monorail structure spanning between buildings
group of palm trees lining the right side of the street
tables and chairs outside a restaurant on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a futuristic city sidewalk at dusk. The player moves past neon-lit buildings on the left featuring holographic advertisements, while palm trees and outdoor seating areas line the right side. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and the elevated transit structure is visible overhead against the darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection corner with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: yellow taxi passes by on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection while navigating through increasing pedestrian traffic near the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the street perpendicular to the walking direction

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the ground approaching the intersection
tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian signals
red cylindrical trash receptacle on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking toward a busy intersection, where the sidewalk opens up to reveal crosswalk markings and traffic infrastructure. The neon office tower looms larger on the left as the camera approaches, while pedestrians cross in various directions. A yellow taxi passes on the street, and the elevated transit structure becomes more prominent overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon between skyscrapers looking skyward

events.description: camera tilts upward dramatically to view the towering architecture overhead

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to observe the towering skyscrapers and overhead transit structures

entered.detail: tall central skyscraper with illuminated horizontal windows stretching upward
massive elevated highway or building connector spanning the street overhead
futuristic vehicle flying between the buildings in the sky gap

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a dramatic view of the canyon-like space between towering skyscrapers. The perspective shifts to focus on the illuminated spire of the central building and the massive overhead transit structure bridging the gap between towers. A flying vehicle is visible in the sky channel, and the natural dusk sky is visible between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with commercial billboards

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and crosses into the street roadway

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow crosswalk and continuing to walk along the roadway toward the large commercial building

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the street ahead of the player

entered.detail: large building facade with multiple levels of illuminated billboards and advertisements
broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
red and white striped construction barriers and cones lining the right side of the road
massive vertical digital screen displaying pink and red advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts back down and transitions from the sidewalk onto the asphalt street, crossing the yellow crosswalk markings. The player walks along the roadway toward a massive commercial building covered in multi-level digital billboards. Construction barriers line the right side of the street, and vehicles drive past as the player approaches the illuminated facade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a neon-lit futuristic sidewalk that eventually transitions into a wide street crossing beneath towering skyscrapers. It begins by moving past holographic advertisements and outdoor seating areas under an elevated transit structure as pedestrians pass in opposing directions. As the camera approaches a busy intersection, the sidewalk opens up to reveal crosswalk markings and a passing yellow taxi while a massive office tower looms closer on the left. The perspective then tilts upward to capture the canyon-like gap between skyscrapers, focusing on an illuminated spire and a flying vehicle gliding through the dusk sky. Finally, the camera tilts back down to cross the asphalt roadway, moving past construction barriers toward a massive commercial building covered in multi-level digital billboards.
